HGSS.074.0000:
Did you just come down from above...?\f
So! You must have solved the
stone-panel puzzle!\f
That is wonderful!\f
You seem to have some talent with
archaeology.\r
I will give you this UNOWN Report.\f
It records UNOWN as you capture them.
I am sure it’ll come in handy!\f
HGSS.074.0001: There is a strange presence here...
HGSS.074.0002:
This is a big room, but there’s
nothing here.
HGSS.074.0003:
This place has a mystical quality to it.\f
...Or a historic quality...\r
...Or an eerie quality...\r
...Or an ancient quality...\r
...Or a solemn quality...\r
...Or a frosty quality...\r
In essence, it feels sort of ethereal.
HGSS.074.0004:
The ruins have not been robbed, nor
tampered with. No graffiti, either.\f
Things are well preserved.
Something here must make people\r
feel they should preserve it.
HGSS.074.0005: It’s a replica of an ancient Pokémon.
HGSS.074.0006:
Hmm.\f
I have been studying the ruins for many
years, but something feels...\r
different.\f
HGSS.074.0007:
Wow!\f
The UNOWN pictures on the wall...\f
It feels like they’re staring at me!\f
HGSS.074.0008:
What is this?
There is something eerie that is making\r
my legs shiver.\r
I can’t stop them!\f
HGSS.074.0009:
Oh, are you all right?
You disappeared right in front of me.\r
I was so surprised!\f
HGSS.074.0010:
I see.\f
The power of ARCEUS and UNOWN affected
each other to create a huge energy,\r
which sent you to the Sinjoh Ruins...?\f
UNOWN, the Ruins of Alph, and ARCEUS...\r
The mystery deepens...\f
It has made me even more inquisitive!\f
I will one day solve all the mysteries!\f
